scripts.test:score: rm -rf .score-test && tsc --ignoreConfig --target es2023 --module esnext --moduleResolution bundler --types node --outDir .score-test src/utils/answers.ts src/types/index.ts src/models/subjects.ts src/utils/id.ts src/pages/questions/utils/validation.ts tests/answers.test.ts tests/validation.test.ts && node --test .score-test/tests/*.test.js && rm -rf .score-test
